creator: radek@raadradd.com
text:
On Wed, Oct 24, 2007 at 09:30:11AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of dns/ddclient,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/117446 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/117446

Approved.

Radek
